Instructions for building and running JerryScript on RIOT-OS with the STM32F4-Discovery board.

# Purpose
The document provides instructions for building and running JerryScript on RIOT-OS using the STM32F4-Discovery board. It outlines the directory structure required for the project, assuming a base directory named `harmony` that contains the `jerryscript` and `RIOT` directories. The document guides users through preparing the RIOT-OS environment, building JerryScript for the specified target, and generating necessary library and executable files. It also includes steps for flashing the compiled code onto the STM32F4-Discovery board and provides a method for cleaning the build artifacts. Additionally, it describes how to run a "Hello World" example using a terminal program like `minicom`, including setting terminal options and executing commands to test the setup.
